title: MARA Reports Second Quarter 2024 Results
text: MARA reported Q2 2024 results showing revenue of $145.1 million, up 78% year-over-year but missing estimates of $157.84 million. The company reported net loss of $199.7 million or $0.72 loss per diluted share versus net loss of $9.0 million or $0.07 loss per diluted share in Q2 2023. The loss was heavily impacted by $148.0 million fair value loss on digital assets. Bitcoin production decreased 30% to 2,058 BTC from Q2 2023 due to unexpected equipment failures and transmission line maintenance at the Ellendale site, increased global hash rate, and the April halving event. Despite revenue miss, the company continued operational expansion initiatives.
